fundamentals.name: ASML Holding N.V. - New York Re

judgment.summary: Highly profitable, fast-growing company with strong returns and significant free cash flow, trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 8.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-15.
positives: Return on equity 52.2% — exceptional shareholder returns.
Free cash flow $8.24B — robust cash generation supports operations and dividends.
Revenue growth 13.2% YoY and earnings growth 19.2% YoY — strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Consensus 'strong buy' with a mean target price above current levels.
negatives: Forward P/E 32.84x — valuation is demanding, pricing in significant future growth.
Debt/Equity 12.99% — while manageable given cash flow, it's a notable leverage point.
Beta 1.37 — stock exhibits higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: ASML Holding NV is highlighted as a top tech stock within billionaire Ken Fisher's portfolio, suggesting continued institutional confidence in the company's prospects. While no specific near-term catalysts are mentioned, this endorsement from a prominent investor may influence market perception. Traders should consider the implications of such high-profile backing alongside ASML's upcoming earnings report.

headlines.title: This is Why ASML Holding NV (ASML) is One of the Top Tech Stocks in Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio
